message:
feat(algorithms): add k-clique communities, edge current-flow betweenness; fix clippy lints

New Rust implementations:
- k_clique_communities: clique percolation method via BFS on clique
  adjacency graph. Cross-validated: two shared-edge triangles correctly
  merge into single 4-node community matching NX output.
- edge_current_flow_betweenness_centrality: Laplacian pseudo-inverse
  based edge flow for all source-target pairs.

Also:
- Fix QueueEntry/PartitionDict visibility (pub → pub(crate))
- Fix needless borrows in iterator __next__ methods
- Suppress unused variable warnings in node_link_graph signature
- Fix stale test for disconnected spanning tree (now yields forest)

475 public Rust functions, 695 Rust tests, 37,489 lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
